name: @amygdala/game-rules
description: Card game rules engines. Shared by the Colyseus server and the web client — the server runs them, the client uses the types and pure helpers.

scripts.pretest: node --input-type=module -e "import{globSync}from'node:fs';const f=globSync('test/**/*.test.ts');if(!f.length){console.error('No test files matched test/**/*.test.ts — a green run of zero tests is worse than a red one.');process.exit(1)}console.log(`test files: ${f.length}`)"
